creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321799

Log:
  Upgrade net-mgmt/netmagis-* ports to 2.2.0

  Submitted by:	maintainer

==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/netmagis-common/Makefile	Wed Jun 26 15:35:12 2013	(r321798)
+++ head/net-mgmt/netmagis-common/Makefile	Wed Jun 26 16:56:56 2013	(r321799)
@@ -2,7 +2,8 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME?=	netmagis
-DISTVERSION?=	2.1.1
+DISTVERSION?=	2.2.0
+PORTREVISION?=	1
 CATEGORIES?=	net-mgmt
 MASTER_SITES=	http://netmagis.org/files/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX?=	-common
